title: Enforce propagated child budgets in runtime workers
description: Make child work spawned by execute_tactus enforce propagated budgets inside evaluation, report, and procedure workers. Read PLEXUS_CHILD_BUDGET for evaluation CLI workers, child_budget from programmatic report task metadata, and _plexus_child_budget from procedure/Tactus context. Add focused tests and update the handle protocol docs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented worker-side enforcement for propagated execute_tactus child budgets. Added shared RuntimeBudgetSpec/RuntimeBudgetMeter parsing and checks; evaluation workers read PLEXUS_CHILD_BUDGET and enforce wallclock plus known scorecard costs; durable report block workers enforce wallclock from task payload child_budget; procedure workers enforce wallclock, apply depth as Tactus max_depth, and reject LLM cost events over the child USD budget. Tests: python -m pytest MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute_test.py plexus/runtime_budget_test.py plexus/cli/feedback/feedback_report_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_procedure_executor_compat.py; practical ruff checks passed.
